chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Zayd Al-Shahham

text: ه عن زيد الشحّام فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن عبد الحميد، عن أبي جميلة، عن زيد الشحّام أبي اسامة.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Zayd Al-Shahham has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Abdul Hamid, from Abu Jamilah, from Zayd Al-Shahham Abu Usamah.
